rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Review stage timed out (max_turns crash) before edits were applied. The fix was planned but never executed.","scope":"pipeline"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"In ensureFeatureBranchIfNeeded, when prNumber is set (fix-ci on existing PR), the code syncs the base branch but never checks out the PR's head branch, causing pipeline to run on default branch.","scope":"src/shared/pipeline.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Kody fix push to existing PR must land on the same PR branch, not create a new branch or new PR.","scope":"kody"}]}
